creator: BM-2cUeCzVy7CNYW6BX4WEnC4s9X9unYMUcre@bitmessage.ch
text:
Created attachment 179714
Diff of the new Makefile and distinfo

Originator: Joachim Kruth [BM-2cUeCzVy7CNYW6BX4WEnC4s9X9unYMUcre@bitmessage.ch]

Synopsis: Update of port: games/doom-freedoom

Release: 11.0-RELEASE

Class: update

Environment: 11.0-RELEASE-p2 on amd64, 11.0-RELEASE-p1 on i386

Description: games/doom-freedoom: Upgrade 0.7 => 0.10.1
1) change master-site to github
2) install freedoom phase 1 and freedoom phase 2
3) remove documentation as it is not included anymore

Fix: a unified diff patch is attached

As this is my first time submitting to the ports tree I tried my best and hope I did everything the right way.
Because the master-site changed I mainly followed the quick porting specification. However I couldn't figure out how to pass the "make patch (as user)" test. I always got a permission error, as the ports directory is only writeable by root. As user root it worked however. All other tests were passed without warnings.
Also I first tried to use the Github macros for the master-sites, but could not get it too work.
Portlint gave a warning that license is missing, however I could not find one neither on the project site nor on github.

If possible I would like to become the maintainer of this port.
